# core-v1_db_get_result (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `js_path` (String) the jsPath for the table to retrieve from the DB, with or without keys embedded in the path

### Optional

- `fields` (String) a comma-separated list of table fields to fetch/return.  If unspecified, all fields are fetched.  If empty, no data for a row will be returned; only the JSON path for the table row.
- `filter` (String) an EQL "where" expression that will be used to filter the set of table rows returned.
- `include_keys` (Boolean) if true/present, the keys of the table are included in the table data.
- `updatesonly` (Boolean) if true/present, only send updates to the table rows, not the current rows.  Only applicable if streaming the results.
